attributes.description: Files accessed via UNC paths (\\server\share\...) or mapped network drives (W:-Z:). The jumplist_network_share / jumplist_likely_mapped_network / jumplist_network_confirmed tags catch all three angles: literal UNC prefix, drive-letter heuristic, and EZ Tools' DriveType=Network. For insider-threat triage this exposes which file servers and shares users have actively used — including SHARES YOU MAY NOT HAVE KNOWN ABOUT.

attributes.title: Jump Lists: NETWORK SHARES + mapped drives (UNC + W:-Z:)
